fields.title: shared: dedupe deepMerge/readJsonFile/migrateApprovalPolicy
fields.description:
Targets:
- `extensions/tau/src/shared/state.ts`: deepMerge implementation
- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/config.ts`: deepMerge + readJsonFile + migrateApprovalPolicy
- `extensions/tau/src/task/registry.ts`: readJsonFile + migrateApprovalPolicy

Goal:
- Move these into `extensions/tau/src/shared/` (e.g. json.ts, merge.ts, sandbox-policy.ts), and reuse.
- Keep behavior identical.

DoD:
- One canonical deep merge helper used by sandbox config + persisted state.
- One canonical json file reader used by task registry + sandbox config.
- One canonical approvalPolicy migration/normalization helper used everywhere.
- `npm -C extensions/tau test` passes.
fields.close_reason: Done in previous session: created shared/fs.ts, shared/json.ts, shared/policy.ts and updated sandbox/config.ts and task/registry.ts to use them.
